name: my-plugins
description: Rick Goshen's personal Claude Code plugin marketplace — CS tutoring plus software-engineering specialist agents and skills.

plugins.name: cs-tutor
plugins.description: A plugin that provides tutoring services for computer science topics.

plugins.name: devops-engineer
plugins.description: Senior DevOps/platform-engineering specialist for OpenTofu, Terraform, IaC, AWS, and CI/CD — inline skills plus a delegated sub-agent with Context7 docs lookup.

plugins.name: ai-engineer
plugins.description: Senior AI/ML engineer — a self-contained decision-framework sub-agent plus focused skills for RAG, evaluation, security, model selection, inference, agents, fine-tuning, and deployment, wired to Context7.
